js.home: async (page) => { try { const res = await fetch(`https://51sptv.com/page/${page}/`); const html = await res.text(); const list = []; const regex = /<a\s+href="(\/archives\/\d+\/)"[^>]*>.*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/h2>/g; let m; while ((m = regex.exec(html)) !== null) { list.push({ vod_id: m[1], vod_name: m[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim(), vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png' }); } return list; } catch (e) { return []; } }
js.detail: async (id) => { return { vod_id: id, vod_name: '嗅探中...', vod_play_url: '嗅探播放$' + id }; }

sniffer.script: window.onload = function() { var v = document.querySelector('video'); if(v) { v.play(); v.muted = true; } }
